text.title: ACME TLS Renewal Automation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: acme_client: must match enum: certbot, acme.sh, lego, traefik-acme; otherwise reject.
scheduler: must match const systemd-timer; otherwise reject.
challenge: must match enum: http-01, dns-01, tls-alpn-01; otherwise reject.
deploy_hook: must match string: shell command (e.g. systemctl reload nginx); otherwise reject.
expiry_alert_days: must match integer 7..30; otherwise reject.
staging_validated: must match boolean const true (first-time issuance only); otherwise reject.
